title: hieracium arragonense subsp. pseudobaeticum
intro: Hieracium arragonense subsp. pseudobaeticum, also known as Hieracium pseudobaeticum or Spanish hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce fever. The health benefits of Hieracium arragonense subsp. pseudobaeticum include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
